a4ParkingStation:
MakeCode extension for the A4 limited parking station model
based on the DFR1216 expansion board and BBC micro:bit.
a4ParkingStation.RgbColor: Preset colors for the two onboard RGB LEDs.
a4ParkingStation.ScreenFontSize: Text sizes supported by the screen.
a4ParkingStation.ScreenObjectType: Screen object types that can be removed.
a4ParkingStation.ambientLightLevel: Returns the micro:bit ambient light level.
a4ParkingStation.batteryLevel: Returns the battery level in percent.
a4ParkingStation.buildTimeString: Builds a time string in HH:MM:SS format.
a4ParkingStation.clearRgb: Turns off the two onboard RGB LEDs.
a4ParkingStation.clearScreen: Clears all objects currently shown on the screen.
a4ParkingStation.initScreenI2C: Initializes the screen in I2C mode.
a4ParkingStation.removeScreenObject: Removes a text or image object from the screen.
a4ParkingStation.rotateScreenImage: Rotates an image already shown on the screen.
a4ParkingStation.setDualRgb: Sets the two onboard RGB LEDs using custom RGB values.
a4ParkingStation.setDualRgbColors: Sets the two onboard RGB LEDs using preset colors.
a4ParkingStation.setRgbBrightness: Sets the brightness of the two onboard RGB LEDs.
a4ParkingStation.setScreenBackgroundImag: Sets a background image on the screen.
a4ParkingStation.showScreenImage: Displays an image on the screen.
a4ParkingStation.showScreenText: Displays a text string on the screen.
a4ParkingStation.vehiclePresent: Returns true when a vehicle is detected on port C0.
